summary: Fixed two bugs in omp-discord-bridge. (1) resolve_model incorrectly fuzzy-matched hyphenated bare model IDs (e.g. "gemma-4-26b-a4b") against short aliases, resolving to the wrong model. Fix: treat any input containing '-' as a direct model ID, skipping alias lookup. (2) When OMP returns a message_end with stopReason="error" and empty content (e.g. model not found in llama-swap), parse_omp_json_output returned empty string causing "(OMP returned an empty response)". Fix: surface the errorMessage from OMP's JSON, showing "Model error: 400 ..." instead. Also updated the stale 'gemma' alias in config.yaml from llama.cpp/gemma-4-31b-draft (no longer in llama-swap) to llama.cpp/gemma-4-26b-a4b.
details: Files changed: src/services/discord_service.rs (resolve_model function: added '-' to passthrough check; parse_omp_json_output: added error detection after content loop; updated/added 3 unit tests), ~/.config/omp-discord-bridge/config.yaml (gemma alias updated). The broken substring_match_prefers_longest_needle test was updated to not use a hyphenated input since that's now the bug by design. 8/8 tests pass. Service restarted and running.
